scripts.update-database: supabase gen types --lang=typescript --project-id tjfhuqfoswtmsdmmepcd > src/types/database.ts && eslint ./src/types/database.ts --fix
scripts.update-claude: claude 'Read the last-indexed hash from CLAUDE.md, run git diff <hash>..HEAD --stat to find what changed, then update only the affected sections in CLAUDE.md. Update the last-indexed hash to the current HEAD when done.'
scripts.update-claude:full: claude 'Scan the entire repo. Update every section of CLAUDE.md to reflect the current state of all files, architecture, dependencies, and config. Update the last-indexed hash to the current HEAD when done.'
